[Calling write_report(title="Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="# Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary\n\nSource: `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  \nLast updated in file: 2026-03-28\n\n## Patient-level dosing\n\n| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose per administration (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |\n|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|\n| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |\n| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n## Notes\n- Calculated dose per administration = `weight_kg × dose_mg_kg`.\n- The source file does not specify pharmacy rounding, concentration, or vial-size rules, so calculated doses above are unrounded/standard arithmetic values.\n- Based on the dosing file alone, the parameters appear internally consistent and current as of the file update date.\n- This summary does **not** confirm live PK model performance or monitoring status; it reflects only the latest dosing configuration file.\n", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing config and drafted a report for Dr. Martinez.

Quick summary from `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`:
- Last updated: 2026-03-28
- Compound: NXB-7042
- Indication: Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

Dosing summary:
- CU-001: 12.4 kg × 0.15 mg/kg = 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min
- CU-002: 9.1 kg × 0.12 mg/kg = 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 15.7 kg × 0.18 mg/kg = 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min

Clinical notes in file:
- CU-001: Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- CU-002: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27

On PK model stability:
- Fact: the dosing file itself looks internally consistent and current.
- Limitation: I have not checked live PK monitoring or model validation logs, so I can’t confirm overall PK model stability from this file alone.

If you want, I can next look for monitoring/status files and give you a direct read on current PK model health.
